author: opus
text:
prime: warn when sibling deliveries overlap your file footprint

Composes with the main-ahead counter from bl-23b0. Reports the
intersection of files changed in (merge-base..main) and
(merge-base..work/<id>). Non-empty overlap is the strongest
predictor of a merge conflict at review time — or, worse, a sibling
landing the antipattern your work is correcting.

Text suffix: "main +N since claim, K overlap" when both signals fire.
JSON gains overlap_files per claimed_status entry.

From the lernie postmortem (2026-04-22): the original incident hinged
on a sibling delivering branches.json into the same files the active
agent was about to merge. This signal makes that visible at session
start instead of at conflict-resolution time.
